title: Molecularly bonded armor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Molecularly bonded armor''' was an immensely strong and expensive substance that was intended to protect vaults, bunkers, and containment cells. It was selected to be used in the construction of [[Stars' End/Legends|Stars' End]] [[Prison/Legends|prison]] on [[Mytus VII/Legends|Mytus VII]]. It was so strong it could hold while being barraged by an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyer's]] [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]].<ref name="EGWT">''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>

The [[Armor/Legends|armor]] was constructed by holding metals into place using [[texture-molding tractor field]]s. [[Ion fuser]]s are applied to the metals, softening them and even liquefying it. As the resulting alloy cooled, it was bombarded with charged-particle vibrating waves that improved the subatomic bonding strength of the molecules. The end result was a nearly indestructible armor with incredible resiliency.<ref name="EGWT" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo at Stars' End]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 1993-11-XX -->''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]''
